ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., Pump, Surge Tank, Pipe) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the component */,
  "distance_from_pumps_feet" REAL /* Distance of the component from the pumps in feet */,
  "connection_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of connections to other components */,
  "pipe_length_feet" REAL /* Length of the pipe in feet (if applicable) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the component was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Under Maintenance) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the component */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the component */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pipes" (
  "pipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipe */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the pipe is part of */,
  "pipe_diameter_inches" REAL /* Diameter of the pipe in inches */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the pipe (e.g., Steel, PVC) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the pipe was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Under Maintenance) */,
  "max_pressure_psi" REAL /* Maximum pressure the pipe can handle */,
  "max_flow_rate_gpm" REAL /* Maximum flow rate the pipe can handle */,
  "insulation_type" TEXT /* Type of insulation used on the pipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipes_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pumps" (
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pump */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the pump is part of */,
  "pump_type" TEXT /* Type of pump (e.g., Centrifugal, Submersible) */,
  "flow_rate_gpm" REAL /* Flow rate of the pump in gallons per minute (GPM) */,
  "horsepower" REAL /* Horsepower of the pump */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the pump was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Under Maintenance) */,
  "max_pressure_psi" REAL /* Maximum pressure the pump can handle */,
  "max_flow_rate_gpm" REAL /* Maximum flow rate the pump can handle */,
  "efficiency_percentage" REAL /* Efficiency of the pump */,
  "run_time_hours" REAL /* Total run time of the pump */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pump_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pumps_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surge_tanks" (
  "surge_tank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surge tank */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the surge tank is part of */,
  "capacity_gallons" REAL /* Capacity of the surge tank in gallons */,
  "height_feet" REAL /* Height of the surge tank in feet */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the surge tank was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Under Maintenance) */,
  "max_pressure_psi" REAL /* Maximum pressure the tank can handle */,
  "max_temperature_f" REAL /* Maximum temperature the tank can handle */,
  "material_thickness_inches" REAL /* Thickness of the tank material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surge_tank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surge_tanks_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the maintenance was performed on */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., Inspection, Repair, Replacement) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "completion_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the maintenance */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the metric is for */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., Pressure, Flow Rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the metric (e.g., Normal, Abnormal) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of alert (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the alarm is for */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of alarm (e.g., Pressure Drop, Leak Detection) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the alarm was triggered */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the alarm */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alarm (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alarm (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to resolve the alarm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Engineer, Maintenance Personnel, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
